title: Act II — Vastiri to Dreadnought
routingNotes: Run Mastodon Badlands BEFORE Keth → Kabala drops Lvl 7 gem (huge for all classes).
Skip Balbala in Traitor's Passage — kill 2 vultures in Deshar for backup Djinn Barya at Lvl 28.
Ascend at Lvl 28 — manually pick the Lvl 28 Barya in trial entry, not the Lvl 22 default.
Trial preference: Ritual > Chalice > Hourglass > Gauntlet.
Aim Lvl 29 for Jamanra; Lvl 30 entering Act III.
speedrunTips: Delay Ascension to Lvl 28. Farm a Djinn Barya from the Watchful Twins in Deshar.
Pick a leveling Ascendancy (Demon Form, Smith of Kitava, Sorcery Ward). Re-spec endgame.
Buy fewer times, more efficiently. Often no weapon upgrade until next act.
Use a leveling item filter with aggressive base highlighting.

steps.text: TP back to start of zone
Talk to Hooded One + Sekhema Asala (x2)
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 2 (Runic Alloys)
steps.reward: Unlocks 13 Runic Alloy currencies via Remnants

steps.text: Use Desert Map → travel to Halani Gates
Enter Halani Gates → talk to Sekhema Asala
Back to Caravan → talk to Sekhema Asala
In town: Talk to Risu + Sekhema Asala

zones.name: Traitor's Passage
zones.newIn05: You no longer need to visit Halani Gates to access Traitor's Passage once Risu is freed.

steps.text: Interact with Ancient Seal door + Runic Seals
Kill Balbala, the Traitor (skip - get Lvl 28 Barya from Deshar vultures instead)
steps.note: Most builds skip — better XP at Lvl 28 and easier fight.
If Asala lags on terra-cotta soldiers, reset checkpoint — she'll snap to you.

steps.text: In town: Talk to Shambrin, Zarka, Sekhema Asala
Travel to Trial of Sekhemas → take WP (run later at Lvl 28)
TP back → travel to Mastodon Badlands

zones.name: Mastodon Badlands
zones.newIn05: To find the Lightless Caverns abyssal, look for cracks in the ground → leads straight to the lair, unlocking the Well of Souls.

steps.text: Run this BEFORE Keth — pushes Keth's level up so Kabala drops Lvl 7 gem
Kill hyenas until Sun Clan Relic drops
steps.note: Tall hyenas (Goliaths) have higher drop chance. Save for Valley of the Titans altar.

steps.text: Kill Iktab & Ekbab → loot Mastodon Tusks
Kill snakes until Kabala Clan Relic drops

steps.note: Drops Lvl 7 skill gem because Mastodon was done first.

steps.text: Talk Water Goddess → Everburning Cinders → ignite Goddess
Travel to Valley of the Titans

steps.reward: Random Unique (Wake of Destruction, Black Heart, Goldrim, Crown of the Victor — or 1k gold floor)

steps.text: Find Medallion near WP, place both relics
steps.reward: Choose: +30% Charm Charges OR +15% Mana Recovery (changeable later)

steps.text: Kill Zalmarath, the Colossus → loot Flame Ruby
In town: Talk to Zarka + Sekhema Asala
Sound Horn at top of caravan
Letter from Lihl Lima → deliver to Shambrin in town

steps.note: Easy ascend path — much simpler than Balbala.

steps.text: Trust the overworld map for direction — exit is straightforward
Interact with Sisters of Garukhan shrine

steps.note: One of the hardest fights in Act II — cap lightning res, watch defiler attacks.

zones.name: Trial of the Sekhemas
zones.newIn05: A Reforging Bench is now placed at the Trial entrance (unlocks in Act 3 — Mektul/Hammer of Kamasa). Your max Runic Ward is added to your starting Honour when beginning a Trial.

steps.text: Enter trial → manually select Lvl 28 Djinn Barya (NOT default Lvl 22!)
Set relic affinity to keep inventory clean
Prefer Ritual > Chalice > Hourglass > Gauntlet rooms

steps.note: Save white chest piece in stash if planning Smith of Kitava — ascendancy locks you out of magic/rare chests.

zones.name: The Dreadnought
zones.newIn05: The second dreadnought area was removed — Jamanra is now fought directly in The Dreadnought.

steps.text: Kill Jamanra, the Risen King (Act Boss)
steps.note: Already starts armor-broken. ~55k phys damage = stuns him before lightning fence phase.

steps.text: Exit caravan (top left) → talk Hooded One → wait animation
Back → talk Sekhema Asala → "Travel to the Sandswept Marsh"
